nodes.name: BacktestRunner.java
nodes.summary: CLI-oriented Spring backtest entry point that runs valuation strategy experiments and writes CSV reports for data checks, single runs, sweeps, sensitivity analysis, and method comparisons.

nodes.name: RedisDao.java
nodes.summary: Redis DAO wrapping hash operations with Jackson serialization for saving, finding, expiring, and deleting cached market-realtime objects.

nodes.name: AhpConfigDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO carrying persisted AHP criteria, pairwise matrix, and computed weights for a specific user configuration.

nodes.name: LoginCacheDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO representing cached login identity data, including credentials metadata and admin status for Redis-backed authentication flows.

nodes.name: LoginDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO for login and user identity payloads exchanged with authentication-related service and API layers.

nodes.name: PaymentDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO reporting payment result status with an identifier, success flag, and optional error message.

nodes.name: PortfolioAllocationRequest.java
nodes.summary: Request DTO describing portfolio allocation inputs such as user ID, budget, stock count, and lot size.

nodes.name: ResponseDto.java
nodes.summary: Generic API response wrapper containing success status, error details, and a typed data payload.

nodes.name: StockDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO exposing stock identity, sector, market price, valuation ratios, and industry benchmark ratios.

nodes.name: StockYearDataDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO carrying annual financial statement inputs and valuation outputs for a stock year record.

nodes.name: StockYearDataHistoryRequestDto.java
nodes.summary: Small request DTO identifying the stock and year used to fetch historical yearly financial data.

nodes.name: StockYearDataHistoryResponseDto.java
nodes.summary: Response DTO pairing a stock-year key with the returned historical data payload.

nodes.name: SubscriptionDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO for subscription state, linking users and plans with dates, error text, type, and lifecycle status.

nodes.name: UserDto.java
nodes.summary: DTO exposing user profile, credentials, admin flag, and favorite stock data for service/API exchange.

nodes.name: RedisEnum.java
nodes.summary: Enum-like constants file defining Redis cache key names used by service-layer caching code.

nodes.name: SubscriptionEnum.java
nodes.summary: Enum-like constants file defining subscription lifecycle status values used by subscription DTOs and entities.

nodes.name: AhpConfigEntity.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity storing a user's AHP criteria JSON, pairwise matrix JSON, and weights JSON in a one-to-one user configuration record.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Lombok and JPA annotations to keep entity classes declarative while mapping relationships and columns.

nodes.name: Subscription.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity modeling a user subscription with date range, status, error message, and links to user and plan records.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Lombok and JPA annotations to keep entity classes declarative while mapping relationships and columns.

nodes.name: SubscriptionPlanEntity.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity defining subscription plans with billing metadata and the subscriptions attached to each plan.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Lombok and JPA annotations to keep entity classes declarative while mapping relationships and columns.

nodes.name: UserEntity.java
nodes.summary: JPA entity for application users, credentials, profile data, favorite stocks, subscriptions, and one-to-one AHP configuration.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Lombok and JPA annotations to keep entity classes declarative while mapping relationships and columns.

nodes.name: AhpConfigRepository.java
nodes.summary: Spring Data repository for AHP configuration records with a finder keyed by the owning user ID.

nodes.name: BacktestRunner
nodes.summary: Spring backtest profile runner that parses CLI options and dispatches market backtest experiments such as single runs, top-N sweeps, weight sensitivity, and method comparisons.

nodes.name: RedisDao
nodes.summary: Redis hash data-access service that serializes cached entities to JSON, applies optional expirations, and deserializes cache hits back into typed objects.

nodes.name: AhpConfigDto
nodes.summary: DTO carrying persisted AHP criteria, pairwise matrix, and computed weights for a specific user configuration.

nodes.name: LoginCacheDto
nodes.summary: DTO representing cached login identity data, including credentials metadata and admin status for Redis-backed authentication flows.

nodes.name: LoginDto
nodes.summary: DTO for login and user identity payloads exchanged with authentication-related service and API layers.

nodes.name: PaymentDto
nodes.summary: DTO reporting payment result status with an identifier, success flag, and optional error message.

nodes.name: PortfolioAllocationRequest
nodes.summary: Request DTO describing portfolio allocation inputs such as user ID, budget, stock count, and lot size.

nodes.name: ResponseDto
nodes.summary: Generic API response wrapper containing success status, error details, and a typed data payload.

nodes.name: StockDto
nodes.summary: DTO exposing stock identity, sector, market price, valuation ratios, and industry benchmark ratios.

nodes.name: StockYearDataDto
nodes.summary: DTO carrying annual financial statement inputs and valuation outputs for a stock year record.

nodes.name: StockYearDataHistoryRequestDto
nodes.summary: Small request DTO identifying the stock and year used to fetch historical yearly financial data.

nodes.name: StockYearDataHistoryResponseDto
nodes.summary: Response DTO pairing a stock-year key with the returned historical data payload.

nodes.name: SubscriptionDto
nodes.summary: DTO for subscription state, linking users and plans with dates, error text, type, and lifecycle status.

nodes.name: UserDto
nodes.summary: DTO exposing user profile, credentials, admin flag, and favorite stock data for service/API exchange.

nodes.name: AhpConfigEntity
nodes.summary: JPA entity storing a user's AHP criteria JSON, pairwise matrix JSON, and weights JSON in a one-to-one user configuration record.

nodes.name: Subscription
nodes.summary: JPA entity modeling a user subscription with date range, status, error message, and links to user and plan records.

nodes.name: SubscriptionPlanEntity
nodes.summary: JPA entity defining subscription plans with billing metadata and the subscriptions attached to each plan.

nodes.name: UserEntity
nodes.summary: JPA entity for application users, credentials, profile data, favorite stocks, subscriptions, and one-to-one AHP configuration.

nodes.name: AhpConfigRepository
nodes.summary: Spring Data repository for AHP configuration records with a finder keyed by the owning user ID.

nodes.name: BacktestRunner
nodes.summary: Constructs the backtest runner with engine, reporter, AHP configuration service, JSON mapper, and Spring application context dependencies.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Parses CLI mode and output arguments, dispatches the selected backtest workflow, and schedules Spring shutdown with an exit code.

nodes.name: runTopNSweep
nodes.summary: Runs the backtest repeatedly for fixed top-N portfolio sizes and writes comparative metrics to a sweep CSV.

nodes.name: runWeightSensitivity
nodes.summary: Runs a base backtest and repeated Dirichlet-perturbed weight simulations to measure sensitivity of returns and top-pick overlap.

nodes.name: runMethodComparison
nodes.summary: Compares AHP, equal-weight, PE-only, and random weighting methods by running each strategy and recording performance metrics.

nodes.name: buildConfig
nodes.summary: Builds a BacktestConfig from CLI parameters, including year range, top-N count, lot size, capital, transaction costs, and AHP weights.

nodes.name: resolveWeights
nodes.summary: Resolves valuation weights from explicit CLI input or persisted user AHP configuration, falling back to equal weights when unavailable.

nodes.name: parseArgs
nodes.summary: Converts --key=value and boolean CLI flags into a map consumed by the backtest mode dispatcher.

nodes.name: perturbDirichlet
nodes.summary: Samples a normalized Dirichlet-like perturbation around base valuation weights for sensitivity testing.

nodes.name: gamma
nodes.summary: Implements a Marsaglia-Tsang gamma sampler used by Dirichlet weight perturbation.

nodes.name: logSummary
nodes.summary: Logs key backtest metrics such as CAGR, Sharpe, drawdown, hit rate, alpha, and beta for a run label.

nodes.name: RedisDao
nodes.summary: Implements RedisDao behavior for RedisDao.java.

nodes.name: save
nodes.summary: Serializes an entity as JSON into a Redis hash and optionally applies an expiration to the hash key.

nodes.name: find
nodes.summary: Reads a JSON value from a Redis hash and deserializes it into the requested Java type, returning null on miss or parse failure.

nodes.name: delete
nodes.summary: Deletes a cached Redis hash field by entity key and ID.
